title: Hegemone chartosepala
taxonomy: Hegemone chartosepala is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Hegemone and is native to tropical Africa. Hegemone chartosepala is further classified into the subfamily Faboideae, which includes a wide range of legume species. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom. The classification of Hegemone chartosepala provides valuable information for botanists and researchers studying plant diversity and taxonomy.
